cards.back: A theoretical model for computation that uses a read/write head to traverse an infinite tape of symbols
A set of symbols used to represent input and output in a Turing Machine
The different configurations a Turing Machine can be in, used to determine its next action
A rule that determines the next state and symbol to read in a Turing Machine
A hypothetical tape of infinite length, used to represent input and output in a Turing Machine
